_comment: One entry per person, matched to allocations.json by 'name' (must be spelled identically). players = the two PLAYER IDs picked: index 0 = forward/attacker (Pot A pick), index 1 = midfielder/defender/goalkeeper (Pot B pick). Any nation; duplicates across people are allowed. Find player IDs via API-Football (GET /players?league=1&season=2026&search=Name). The 'name'/'position' fields are optional display hints; live data overrides them. Position is validated by the fetch job's verify step (see README). Picks lock before 11 June and never change.
